ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video content */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the video */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the video */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the video */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "thumbnails" TEXT /* Path to video thumbnails */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_clips" (
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clip */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video that the clip belongs to */,
  "min_timecode" TEXT /* Starting timecode of the clip */,
  "max_timecode" TEXT /* Ending timecode of the clip */,
  "clip_description" TEXT /* Description of the clip content */,
  "clip_type" TEXT /* Type of the clip */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the clip */,
  "speaker_id" TEXT /* Speaker ID in the clip */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotional tone of the clip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_clips_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcriptions" (
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription */,
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clip that the transcription belongs to */,
  "transcription_type" TEXT /* Type of transcription (user or auto) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Transcription text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcription was created */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the automatic transcription */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the transcription */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES video_clips ("clip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the clip */,
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clip that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the clip was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES video_clips ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcription_edits" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit */,
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transcription that was edited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the edit */,
  "edit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the edit was made */,
  "previous_text" TEXT /* Previous text before the edit */,
  "new_text" TEXT /* New text after the edit */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the edit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcription_edits_transcription_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcription_id") REFERENCES transcriptions ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcription_edits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of keyword (video or clip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_keywords" (
  "video_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video-keyword association */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* Reference to the video */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_keywords_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clip_keywords" (
  "clip_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clip-keyword association */,
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clip */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clip_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_keywords_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES video_clips ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)
